name: "✨ Feature Request"

  criteria, rationale, and success metrics."
title: "\U0001F9E9 Feature Request: <Component/Area> — <Concise Summary>"

---

<!--
Use this to request a new capability or enhancement.
Avoid sharing secrets or personally identifiable information (PII).
-->

## 📌 What this template is for (and not for)

**Use this template for:**  
- Proposing new functionality or tools  
- Enhancements to existing features  
- Ideas for improving workflows or expanding capabilities  

**Don’t use this template for:**  
- Bugs, crashes, or broken functionality → use **🐛 Bug Report**  
- Usability feedback → use **📝 Feedback Report**  
- Performance issues → use **🚀 Performance Report**  
- Documentation improvements → use **📖 Documentation Report**  
- Accessibility concerns → use **♿ Accessibility Report**  
- Security vulnerabilities → follow **SECURITY.md** (responsible disclosure) 

---

## ✍️ Summary
<!-- One or two sentences describing the requested capability. -->

## 👥 Who Is Affected
<!-- Audience/persona and approximate scope (All / Many / Some / Few). -->

## 🤔 Problem / Motivation
<!-- What problem are we solving? Why does it matter? Include pain points or user goals. -->

## 🔎 Current Experience / Limitation
<!-- What happens today? Where is the friction or limitation? -->

## 💡 Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe the solution at a high level. Include examples, sketches, or references if helpful. -->

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria
<!-- Verifiable outcomes (Given/When/Then or checklist). -->
- [ ] 
- [ ] 
- [ ] 

## 📈 Success Metrics
<!-- How we will measure success (for example, adoption, conversion, error rate, time-on-task). -->

## 🔗 Dependencies / Risks (Optional)
<!-- Upstream services, permissions, migrations, sequencing, or rollout risks. -->

## 🗺️ Scope / Out of Scope (Optional)
<!-- Clarify what is included vs. explicitly excluded to prevent scope creep. -->

## 🧰 Environment (if applicable)
- Platform: Web / Mobile / Desktop
- Affected areas: User Interface (UI) / Application Programming Interface (API) / Backend
- Application version (Semantic Versioning (SemVer)): `x.y.z`

## 🔗 Additional Context / Links
<!-- Related issues, Pull Requests (PRs), designs, analytics, or documents. -->

---

### ✅ Reporter Checklist
- [ ] I explained the problem, motivation, and proposed solution.
- [ ] I included acceptance criteria and success metrics.
- [ ] I linked relevant designs, analytics, or related issues.
- [ ] I removed or obfuscated secrets and personally identifiable information (PII).
